args.title: Prior Auth Required – Emma Lee SLP Eval (BCBS PPO BCBS-884200)

args.body:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. We have received the referral from Dr. Priya Nair for Emma's speech-language pathology evaluation.

We have confirmed that Emma's Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO plan is in-network with our practice. Before we can finalize her appointment, our billing team needs to complete a prior authorization with your insurance — this is a standard step required by your plan for evaluation services.

We will be in touch as soon as the authorization is in place to offer you available appointment times. Based on your preference for after-school slots on Tuesdays or Thursdays, we will do our best to accommodate that schedule.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to contact our front desk at [PHONE NUMBER].

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Billing must obtain prior authorization from BCBS PPO before intake confirms Emma's SLP evaluation; best available slot matching family preference is Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP on Thursday 2026-05-01 at 3:30 PM (slot_slp_maya_2026_05_01_1530).

items.decision_rationale: This is a complete new referral with all required intake fields present. Insurance verification returned in-network status with an active BCBS PPO plan (copay $30), but flagged that prior authorization is required before the evaluation can be scheduled — billing has been tasked accordingly. Slot search identified a strong preference match (after-school Thursday with SLP Maya Chen on 2026-05-01); no slot hold was placed as this is a new patient pending auth, and confirmation must come from intake staff after authorization is secured.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Speech therapy evaluation requested; mother incidentally disclosed father has been 'getting rough' with Leo during weekend visits

args.reason: Parent disclosed that the child's father has been "getting rough" with Leo during weekend visits, constituting a potential physical abuse/unsafe caregiving disclosure requiring immediate mandated-reporter review by the clinical lead.

args.notes: Mother Maria Gomez left a voicemail (item_2, received 2026-04-27 19:43 PT) requesting an SLP evaluation for 6-year-old Leo. During the message she disclosed: "He has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends." This language constitutes a potential physical abuse / unsafe caregiving disclosure. Mandated-reporter obligations must be reviewed immediately. Do NOT discuss the disclosure in any outbound communication to the family. Contact mother at 555-0102 to follow up. Patient search returned no existing record — Leo appears to be a new patient.
args.title: P0 Safeguarding Review – Leo Gomez (age 6)

args.body: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be in touch with you at 555-0102 as soon as possible to discuss your request. We look forward to connecting with you soon.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review the safeguarding disclosure immediately (same hour) and assess mandated-reporter obligations before any scheduling or outbound contact occurs.
items.draft_reply: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be in touch with you at 555-0102 as soon as possible to discuss your request. We look forward to connecting with you soon.

escalation.reason: Parent disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough' with Leo during weekend visits — a potential physical abuse / unsafe caregiving disclosure requiring immediate mandated-reporter review by the clinical lead.

items.decision_rationale: The voicemail contains an incidental but explicit disclosure that Leo's father has been 'getting rough with him,' which policy identifies as a P0 safeguarding concern requiring same-hour clinical lead review and mandated-reporter assessment. No scheduling or clinical advice actions were taken, and the drafted acknowledgement is strictly neutral with no investigative language. A patient search returned no existing record, confirming Leo is a new potential patient; all intake processing is paused pending safeguarding clearance.

args.notes: New OT referral received from Westside Pediatrics (Dr. Helena Yu) for Owen Brooks (DOB 2020-02-11). Insurance verified as Kaiser HMO (Member ID: KSR-4471) — OUT OF NETWORK for Cedar Kids Therapy. Per policy, a benefits conversation with the family must occur before any slot is held. Parent contact: Rachel Brooks, 555-0103, rachel.brooks@example.com. Family prefers morning appointments. Do not schedule until benefits/financial conversation is complete and family agrees to proceed.
args.title: Out-of-network benefits conversation needed — Owen Brooks (Kaiser HMO)

args.body:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics for Owen's occupational therapy evaluation. We have received the referral and are happy to begin the intake process.

Before we can schedule an appointment, we want to make sure you have full information about coverage: our records indicate that Kaiser HMO is not currently in our network at Cedar Kids Therapy. This means out-of-pocket costs may apply.

A member of our billing team will be reaching out to you shortly — by phone at 555-0103 or by email — to walk through your benefits and any financial options so you can make an informed decision about how to proceed.

We look forward to connecting with you. If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to contact our front desk.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team must complete an out-of-network benefits conversation with Rachel Brooks (555-0103) before any slot can be held; task created and draft acknowledgement prepared for human review and sending.

items.decision_rationale: This is a complete, well-formed new OT referral from Westside Pediatrics with all required intake fields present. Insurance verification confirmed Kaiser HMO is out-of-network for Cedar Kids Therapy, which per policy requires a benefits conversation before any slot can be held — so find_slots was intentionally not called. A billing task (due today) and a draft acknowledgement email to the parent have been created for staff review; no scheduling action can proceed until the family is informed of the out-of-network status and agrees to move forward.

args.notes:
New PT referral received from Carla Mendez (carla.mendez@example.com, 555-0104) for Mateo Ramirez, DOB 2019-03-15. Concern: toe walking and frequent tripping. Insurance: Aetna PPO, member ID AET-9910 — confirmed IN-NETWORK, $30 copay, but PRIOR AUTH IS REQUIRED before scheduling. 

ACTION ITEMS:
1. PATIENT IDENTITY: A record for "Mateo Ramirez Jr." (DOB 2019-03-15) already exists under guardian Sofia Ramirez (pat_mateo_ramirez_jr). Verify whether this is the same child and whether Carla Mendez is an authorized guardian — do NOT link records or schedule until confirmed.
2. Obtain prior authorization from Aetna PPO before booking any PT evaluation.
3. Available PT eval slots identified: 4/29 at 1:00 PM and 5/6 at 9:00 AM (Priya Shah, PT, DPT). Confirm slot once auth and identity are resolved.
4. Sender wrote in English, but family surname suggests possible Spanish preference — confirm language preference with Carla Mendez.
5. No physician referral document attached — confirm pediatrician fax was received separately.
args.title: New PT Referral - Mateo Ramirez / Identity & Auth Verification Needed

args.body:
Dear Ms. Mendez,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy regarding a PT evaluation for Mateo. We have received your referral request and our intake team will be in touch shortly to confirm next steps.

To move forward, we will need to:
• Verify Mateo's information in our system
• Confirm authorization with your insurance (Aetna PPO) prior to scheduling

Once those steps are complete, a team member will contact you at 555-0104 to confirm your appointment. If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach us by phone or through the patient portal.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff must verify Carla Mendez's guardianship against existing patient record pat_mateo_ramirez_jr, obtain Aetna PPO prior authorization, and confirm physician referral receipt before booking the PT evaluation.

A partial patient record match was found (Mateo Ramirez Jr., same DOB, different guardian name) which requires human identity verification before any records are linked or slots booked — a hold was therefore not placed. Two PT evaluation slots were surfaced for staff reference once auth and identity are resolved.

missing_info: formal referral or intent to book

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We're glad you got in touch.

While we aren't able to provide clinical advice through messaging, our speech-language pathologists would be happy to help answer questions like yours. The best next step would be to schedule a brief screening or evaluation so one of our SLP clinicians can assess Ava directly and give you personalized, professional guidance.

If you'd like to move forward, please reply to this message or give us a call and we can walk you through the intake process. There's no obligation — we're here to help you make the most informed decision for Ava.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Send the drafted portal reply inviting Jordan Kim to schedule an SLP screening or evaluation; no clinical advice to be given via messaging per policy.

items.decision_rationale: This is a general developmental question from a parent — no appointment is requested, no referral is attached, and there are no safeguarding indicators. Per clinical advice policy, staff and automated systems must not provide clinical guidance via message, so the reply routes Jordan toward a screening or evaluation instead. Ava was not found as an existing patient, and no insurance information was provided, so no intake or insurance steps are warranted at this time. Urgency is P3 as this is an informational inquiry with no same-day action required.

args.title: Incomplete referral – Sam Taylor (Lakeview Pediatrics / Dr. Omar Keene)

args.body:
Dear Dr. Keene and Lakeview Pediatrics Team,

Thank you for the referral for Sam Taylor received on April 28, 2026 requesting Speech-Language Pathology services.

Unfortunately, we are unable to process this referral as submitted because the following required fields are blank:

• Date of Birth
• Parent/Guardian name and contact information
• Insurance payer
• Insurance member ID

Please resubmit a completed referral with the above information so our intake team can move forward. If you have any questions, please contact our intake team directly.

We appreciate your partnership and look forward to serving this family.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy – Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team should contact Lakeview Pediatrics today to request a corrected, complete referral before any intake steps can proceed.

Reachable at 555-0108 or anita.patel@example.com. A pending_review hold has been placed on slot_ot_james_2026_05_05_1000 (James Owens, OTR/L — Mon 2026-05-05 at 10:00am). Please call/email Anita today to confirm this slot or identify alternatives. Also void the 3pm slot for today's calendar and apply any same-day cancellation policy as appropriate.
args.title: Same-day OT cancellation & reschedule — Noah Patel

args.body:
Hi Anita,

Thank you for letting us know — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well!

We've received your request to cancel today's 3:00 PM OT appointment and a member of our front desk team will be in touch with you today (by phone at 555-0108 or by email) to confirm a reschedule.

We do have a potential opening with James Owens, OTR/L on Monday, May 5 at 10:00 AM that we'd like to discuss with you — our team will confirm whether it works for your family.

We hope Noah feels better soon!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk must call or email Anita Patel today to confirm the pending hold for James Owens, OTR/L on Mon 2026-05-05 at 10:00 AM (hold_id: hold_01ksx345nk2gcy5vfr3epwnyg9), or identify an alternative OT slot; also clear Noah's 3pm slot from today's calendar.

items.decision_rationale: Policy explicitly classifies same-day cancellations as P1 operational issues, and the patient record confirms Noah Patel is an active existing patient with a likely OT appointment today. The only available OT slot (James Owens, 2026-05-05 at 10:00 AM) has been placed on a pending_review hold for human confirmation; front desk has been tasked to contact Anita today to finalise the reschedule and clear today's calendar slot.
